column1: ** This file contains a mapping of the variables reported by remind2 for the GAMS side of transport in REMIND and the variables reported by reporttransport for the coupled transport sector model EDGE-T. Under "variable" the equivalent names in EDGE-T are listed. The list of transport variables reported by remind2 is comprehensive. Variables that do not have an equivalent in reporttransport get NA. date = 06-02-2025
